title: Emotional Brilliance
description: Ready, set, go! Push a little of this translucent face powder into your finished makeup look and soak up excess shine and oils without clogging up pores.
ingredients: Simmondsia Chinensis Seed Oil (Organic Jojoba Oil)

images.alt: An overhead close-up view of a small pile of pale pink, finely milled powder that appears slightly chunky and matte, centered on a light grey background. The product is Emotional Brilliance ~ Finishing Powder.

A partially open black pot of Emotional Brilliance ~ Finishing Powder is shown floating against a blue gradient background. A small pile of the pale pink powder is visible next to the pot's base. The black lid has white text identifying the product.

A person with dark skin smiles, touching their face. They wear a subtle mauve-brown lip color and gold earrings, against a blue background, likely finished with Emotional Brilliance ~ Finishing Powder.

A person with dark skin smiles widely, touching their cheek. They have a subtle shimmer and gold hoop earrings. The smooth finish on their skin suggests the Emotional Brilliance ~ Finishing Powder, against a bright blue background.

A person with dark skin smiles widely, holding the black pot of Emotional Brilliance ~ Finishing Powder over their left eye. They wear a white top and a gold hoop earring, against a bright blue background. The text on the pot is clearly visible.
